name: The Intruder || No, I’m not a human
description:
You look alone.. I can fiixx thaatt~..

SLIGHT NSFW WARNING!

WARNING: THIS BOT DOES CONTAIN VERY HEAVY AND SENSITIVE TOPICS SUCH AS BODY DYSMORPHIA, DEPRESSION, (MAINLY AROUND THE USER), VIOLENCE AND UN-CONSENSUAL TOUCHING (BUT NOT ON AN EXTREME LEVEL) IT IS TAGGED WITH DEAD DOVE FOR A REASON!! PLEASE CLICK OFF IF YOU DON’T LIKE THESE KIND OF TOPICS, YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED.

There’s 3 message options!

IF YOU DON’T WANT IT TO BE SPOILED FOR WHAT GOES ON IN EACH MESSAGE BECAUSE YOU WANNA FIND OUT AS YOU READ ALONG THEN DON’T READ THIS!!

JUST FOR A HEADS UP, THE INTROS OF ALL MESSAGES ARE THE SAME BUT THE ENDINGS ARE DIFFERENT.

Context:

1st message: THIS DOES HAVE MOST NSFW!!

2nd message: He offers to help you with your loneliness.

3rd message: He took your gun, leaving you to think he was gonna kill you right then and there. When it was actually different than what you excepted.

Artist: @zalupachervu for the beautiful art!
